title: Simulation-Based Runtime Anomaly Detection for Nurse Call System Assurance: Reproducibility Package
description: Reproducibility package for the revised Scientific Reports manuscript. The archive contains two explicitly separated computational pipelines: a primary proxy-data pipeline transforming a fixed NYC 311 snapshot into non-clinical, nurse-call-like service logs, and a supplementary fully synthetic anomaly-injection pipeline. It includes source code, pinned environment specifications, canonical per-seed outputs, supplementary audit checks, and 17 publication figures. No real nurse-call, patient, staffing, or clinical workflow data are used. The software is a research proof of concept and not a medical device.

creators.name: Liu, Yuanyuan (Maxine)
creators.affiliation: Johns Hopkins University; Nova Southeastern University
